## Summary

What this pull request does, in one or two sentences.

## Work folder

A link to the `.claude/work/<id>/` folder for this work.

## Requirements

A link to the requirements, or to the project wiki entry that holds them.

## Accessibility impact

How this change affects accessibility. Confirm it meets WCAG 2.2 at AAA, or link a documented exception.

## Security impact

How this change affects security. Confirm the OWASP Top 10 defences hold, or link a documented exception.

Confirm that no secrets, API keys, tokens, or credentials have been introduced or hard-coded in this change.

If any new third-party dependencies are introduced, confirm they have been checked for known vulnerabilities and their provenance is acceptable.

## Test plan

What Carol tested: functional, accessibility, and visual. Link the test report.

## Screen-reader confirmation

Confirm this change has been checked with a screen reader, and which one.

## Checklist

- [ ] Continuous integration passes.
- [ ] Accessibility checks pass at WCAG 2.2 AAA.
- [ ] Security checks pass.
- [ ] Carol has signed off.
- [ ] The change conforms to the project's recorded architecture.
- [ ] Tim has approved the merge.
